message:
fix: cascade-delete blocked step children during wisp GC (bd-7hjy)

When bd mol wisp gc deletes an abandoned parent formula wisp, its
dependent step children were left behind as permanent orphans. The GC
collected parents by age but DeleteIssues partitioned wisps out before
the cascade expansion logic, so wisp-to-wisp cascade never happened.

Add FindWispDependentsRecursive to DoltStore which does batched BFS
traversal of wisp_dependencies to find all transitive dependents.
Call it from runWispGC to expand the abandoned set before deletion,
ensuring blocked step children are cleaned up with their parents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
